meta.title: HORMUZ STRAIT CLOSURE
meta.question: How long will the Strait of Hormuz remain effectively closed?
meta.resolution: Sustained >30% of pre-war Hormuz traffic (~40 transits/day)

posteriorHistory.note: South Pars/Ras Laffan, infrastructure war phase
Haifa refinery, Saudi refineries, F-35 damaged
Kharg force-sizing, Boxer accelerated, IEA 6mo estimate
Iran hardened counter-threat, vetting system, zero ultimatum compliance, selective blockade institutionalizing

C_pivot_kharg.label: Lets deadline pass, pivots to Kharg

tier1_critical.desc: NOTAM/NAVAREA warning for northern Persian Gulf / Kharg vicinity
Tripoli ARG AIS goes dark in Gulf of Oman for 24+ hours
Massive uptick in airstrikes on Bushehr province / northern Gulf coast
tier1_critical.note: Cooper confirmed coastal anti-ship facility struck with 5000lb bombs. Watch for acceleration.

tier2_strong.desc: Tripoli tracked entering Persian Gulf (not Gulf of Oman)
Trump goes quiet on Kharg for 48+ hours (OPSEC)
Pentagon briefings suddenly vague about MEU mission
Evacuation orders for US civilians in Gulf states
48hr ultimatum expires without power plant strikes (Kharg substituted)

tier3_suggestive.desc: More 'agonizing decision' articles with operational specifics
tier3_suggestive.note: CNN Mar 21 deep dive matches pre-invasion socialization pattern exactly.

tier3_suggestive.desc: Defense stocks spike / oil spikes on no new news
tier3_suggestive.note: Weekend. Next check Sun futures open + Mon equity open.

tier3_suggestive.desc: Israel increases strike tempo as coordinated distraction
tier3_suggestive.note: Katz announced significant increase next week. IDF Chief approved 'all fronts' strikes. Double-confirmed.

tier3_suggestive.desc: CENTCOM specifically targeting Hormuz coastal defense assets
tier3_suggestive.note: Cooper confirmed 5000lb bombs on underground coastal anti-ship missile facility.

anti_indicators.desc: Tripoli parks visibly in Gulf of Oman for 3+ days
Pentagon announces escort ops with MEU aviation
Trump publicly says 'we don't need Kharg'
Ceasefire talks announced through any channel
anti_indicators.note: Iran explicitly refuses talks while under attack (Bloomberg Mar 20).

anti_indicators.desc: Tripoli ARG splits up (no amphibious assault possible)
Trump actually hits power plants Mon night (escalation goes infrastructure not ground)
anti_indicators.note: Iran counter-threat: will hit US/allied energy+IT+desalination. Raises cost of execution.

actorModel.description: Trump-adjusted decision framework with four layers

trump.name: President Trump
trump.decisionStyle: Impulsive, fixation-driven, spectacle-optimizing. Evaluates operations on immediate visual results, not long-term strategic cost.
filters: Military planning process filters novel stupidity
overrides: Personal fixations bypass tactical filter — Kharg qualifies because assault will succeed on Day 1

centcom.name: CENTCOM / Joint Staff
centcom.decisionStyle: Competent tactical execution within parameters given. 15,000+ targets hit, low casualty rate.
filters: Normal planning process filters tactically idiotic ideas
overrides: Direct presidential order gets executed regardless of strategic risk assessment

iran.name: Iranian leadership (IRGC + civilian)
iran.role: Adversary — controls Hormuz closure and escalation pace
iran.decisionStyle: Attrition-oriented, symmetric escalation threats, willing to absorb punishment for strategic position

methodology: ACTIONS OVER RHETORIC — only kinetic events, force movements, budget requests, verified data move posteriors. Trump words discounted. IRGC threats tagged THREATENED until executed.
SOCIALIZATION PATTERN RECOGNITION — 'agonizing decision' articles with hyper-specific operational detail = narrative prep for decision already on conveyor belt
DON'T FRONT-RUN — set tripwires and let news confirm. Posteriors move when indicators fire, not when thesis feels good.
TRUMP FIXATION OVERRIDE — when CinC has personal fixation predating the situation, tactical filter is bypassed. Kharg = 38yr fixation.

evidenceLog.text: Iran fires 8th missile salvo of the day at Israel. IRGC targeting Arad, Dimona, Eilat, Beersheba, Kiryat Gat. 100+ wounded. Sustained inventory depth.
Israel strikes Qasmiya Bridge over Litani River. DM Katz ordered destruction of ALL Litani crossings. Lebanese President Aoun: 'prelude to ground invasion.'
Iran Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: 'Critical infrastructure, energy infrastructure, and oil facilities throughout the region will be destroyed in irreversible manner' if power plants hit.
Trump: 'weeks ahead of schedule,' Iran's 'navy and air force are dead, they have absolutely no defense.' Victory framing — ambiguous whether prelude to declare-victory or Kharg push.
Brent Sunday open $106.41, range $105-113. Elevated but no panic gap. Bitcoin dropped to $69,200 on ultimatum, recovered to $70,800.
Tripoli ARG arrival window open. No confirmed theater arrival yet as of 1439 PST. Still the single most important near-term indicator.

watchpoints.watch: AIS positioning — Gulf of Oman vs Persian Gulf. THE critical indicator.
Does Trump follow through on power plants? Or pivot to Kharg? Or extend/drop?
Positioning, coordination with CENTCOM, ISR over Kharg
NOTAM, AIS dark, strike tempo on Bushehr coast
